text: 3 papers accepted at ICLR 2026 workshops: ConFu (lossless inference acceleration), CAOTE (budgeted KV cache / token eviction), and Skip to the Good Part (representation analysis in dLLMs vs. AR models)
New preprint: Skip to the Good Part — representation structure analysis & layer skipping in diffusion vs. autoregressive LLMs
New preprint: Efficient Training-Free Multi-Token Prediction via Embedding-Space Probing
New preprint: ConFu — Contemplate the Future for Better Speculative Sampling
New preprint: Spiffy — Multiplying diffusion LLM acceleration via lossless speculative decoding
Presenting KeyDiff at NeurIPS 2025, San Diego
Presenting VocabTrim at ICML 2025 ES-FOMO Workshop, Vancouver
